title: 30 Pcs Artificial Bougainvillea Silk Bougainvillea Branches Artificial Bougainvillea Tree Branches for Wedding Home Indoor Outdoor Decorations Centerpieces (Pink)
features: Luxurious and Authentic Feel: crafted primarily with silk, these artificial bougainvillea flower stems exude a sense of luxury and authenticity; The intricate material work enhances their realism and ensures their longevity as a stunning home decoration, adding an elegant touch that surpasses that of real plants

Impressive Length: with a generous length of 31.5 inches/ 80 cm, each silk artificial bouquet offers a standout visual impact; The long stems can be easily trimmed or bent to fit any vase or stand, allowing for versatile placement; With 24 flowers in each bouquet, it is an ideal choice for interior design

Beautiful Rose Red Color: delivered in a package of 30, these artificial bougainvillea tree branches come in a stunning and captivating pink color; This vibrant color allows for effortless integration into multi decorative settings, ensuring they meet all your decoration needs; From indoor spaces to outdoor gardens, these stems will bring life to any area

Lifelike and Vibrant Design: each individual artificial bougainvillea stem is meticulously created to mirror the lifelike beauty and vibrancy of real bougainvillea flowers; These remarkable designs are sure to brighten up any space and complement real plants seamlessly, effortlessly uplifting your mood

Wide Applications: the silk artificial bougainvillea flower stems offer unlimited possibilities when it comes to decoration; Whether adorning your living room, office, wedding venue, garden, balcony, or when applied as a heartfelt gift for loved ones, these vibrant bouquets are suitable for everyone and can enhance a wide range of spaces
description: Product description Features: Quality silk material: Made from quality silk, these artificial bougainvilleas exceed expectations in terms of durability and visual appeal. The choice of silk fabric ensures a realistic appearance and a touch that is both soft and luxurious, making these flowers truly stand out. Easy to arrange: The flexible stems of these artificial bougainvillea flowers make them incredibly easy to arrange. Whether you want to create a bouquet or an elegant single stem arrangement, they offer endless possibilities for creativity and allow you to customize your decor to suit your personal style. Specifications: Material: silk Main color: pink Size: about 31.5 inches/ 80 cm Package includes: 30 x Artificial bougainvillea flower stems Notes: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist a slight difference due to different screen displays. Safety Warning This artificial plant may cause skin irritation in some individuals. Handle with care and keep away from children and pets. For outdoor use, avoid exposure to harsh chemicals or extreme weather conditions that could make the product unsafe to handle. Always follow proper care instructions to ensure safe use.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Interior home decor, office or workplace settings, outdoor decor for covered spaces, staging for events or photography, gifts
